message:
refactor(storage,indexer): replace SqliteStorage with FrankenStorage type alias, migrate indexer to &FrankenStorage

Complete the rusqlite elimination by replacing SqliteStorage struct with
a type alias to FrankenStorage and migrating the indexer:

Storage (sqlite.rs — ~3300 lines removed):
- SqliteStorage struct replaced with pub type SqliteStorage = FrankenStorage
- Remove all duplicate SqliteStorage impl blocks (open, open_readonly,
  ensure_agent, ensure_workspace, insert_conversation_tree, etc.)
- New IndexingCacheStorage trait abstracting ensure_agent/ensure_workspace
- New FrankenStorage methods: fetch_messages_for_embedding_since,
  get/set_last_embedded_message_id
- Migrate check_schema_compatibility, create_backup to frankensqlite APIs
- Analytics rebuild: DELETE statements drop empty [] params
- PricingTable::load: row.get(N) -> row.get_typed(N)

Indexer (indexer/mod.rs):
- All signatures: &mut SqliteStorage -> &FrankenStorage (interior mutability)
- open_storage_for_index returns FrankenStorage
- New replace_file_from_temp() for atomic file replacement
- watch_sources: flatten nested match to flat pattern match
- Tests: add #[serial], rewrite ensure_fts_schema for frankensqlite

Other files:
- analytics/bucketing.rs: SqliteStorage:: -> FrankenStorage:: refs
- redact_secrets.rs: add #[serial], new redaction_can_be_disabled test
- key_management.rs: fix mismatched Zeroizing::new() parenthesis
- ui/app.rs: add replace_file_from_temp(), new overwrite test
- update_check.rs: add #[serial] to 10 env-mutating tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
